basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 75 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh will recruit 75 Faculty posts including Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor on Regular and Contractual basis through AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates can submit the Google Form online before 20 June 2026 and send the hard copy application before 25 June 2026. Check details like eligibility, salary, apply online, vacancy & more from the article.

application_fee.details: To apply for AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty posts, candidates from general and OBC/EWS categories will have to pay the application fee through NEFT mode only. SC/ST and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from payment of fee. No other mode of payment including UPI will be accepted. | Fee to be paid via NEFT to: Account Name – Recruitment Fund, AIIMS Bilaspur | Bank – State Bank of India, Bilaspur | Account No. – 42734198120 | IFSC – SBIN0063972. The application fee is non-refundable. | Also Read: BOBCAPS Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: MD/MS in Anatomy or M.Sc. Anatomy with Ph.D.
MD in Biochemistry or M.Sc. Medical Biochemistry / Biochemistry with Ph.D.
M.Ch in Burns and Plastic Surgery / Plastic Surgery
DM in Rheumatology / DM in Clinical Immunology
MD in Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Family Medicine
DM in Endocrinology & Metabolism / MD Medicine with training
MD in Microbiology / Medical Microbiology or M.Sc. Microbiology with Ph.D.
DM in Medical Oncology / DM in Clinical Haematology
MS General Surgery / MS Orthopaedic Surgery / MD PMR / DNB PMR
MD in Pharmacology or Master’s Degree with Ph.D.
MD in Physiology or Master’s Degree in Physiology with Ph.D.
MD in Transfusion Medicine / Blood Banking
MD Emergency Medicine / MD Medicine / MS General Surgery

qualification.details: The recruitment notification includes vacancies for Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor posts. Candidates must fulfil the prescribed educational qualifications, experience and age criteria to be eligible. Candidates must be registered with the State Medical Council/MCI/NMC. | The age limit is calculated as on the closing date of submission of offline application form i.e. 25 June 2026.

salary_details.professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 14A (Basic 1,68,900- 2,20,400) as per 7th CPC and all usual allowances (Plus NPA for candidates possessing medical qualification)
salary_details.associate professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 13A1 (Basic 1,38,300- 2,09,200) as per 7th CPC and all usual allowances (Plus NPA for candidates possessing medical qualification)
salary_details.assistant professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 12 (Basic 1,01,500- 1,67,400) as per 7thCPC and all usual allowances (Plus NPA for candidates possessing medical qualification)
salary_details.details: For Regular Direct Appointments | For Contract Appointments | Faculties appointed on the post of Assistant Professor (Contractual) will be paid consolidated monthly remuneration as Basic Pay (₹1,01,500) + NPA @ 20% of Basic Pay + Applicable DA. The amount of remuneration so fixed shall remain unchanged for the entire term of the contract, including extension, if any. | There will be no annual increment/percentage increase during the contract period. They may also be entitled to residential accommodation subject to availability and applicable deductions in respect of such accommodation as per Govt. instructions. | Retired faculty, appointed on contractual basis, as consultants will be paid fixed consolidated monthly remuneration arrived at by deducting basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement. The amount of remuneration so fixed shall remain unchanged for the term of the contract. | There will be no annual increment/percentage increase during the contract period. They may also be entitled to residential accommodation subject to availability and applicable deductions in respect of such accommodation as per Govt. instructions.

selection_process: The AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty Selection Process 2026 consists of scrutiny of applications by a scrutiny committee

and personal interview by the Standing Selection Committee (SSC) of the Institute. Candidates called for interview will be required to make a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation on their work/achievements before the selection committee. No online interview through Skype/Viber or any electronic media will be accepted.
Scrutiny of Applications by Scrutiny Committee Shortlisting based on experience

and administrative experience Personal Interview by Standing Selection Committee (SSC) 5-Minute PowerPoint Presentation before Selection Committee Document Verification & Medical Fitness by Institute Medical Board
how_to_apply: Here, we have provided the direct, simple and easy steps to apply for AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty Recruitment 2026 posts. Every candidate can follow these steps one by one and submit the application.
Pay the application fee through NEFT to the designated SBI account and save the transaction proof.
Download the soft copy of Application Form (Appendix-I), Career Graph (Appendix-II in MS Word/PDF format) and Presentation (Appendix-III in PPT format) from the official website.
Fill in the Application Form and Career Graph in the prescribed format. Rename files as per the prescribed naming convention (e.g. "Name Post Department.pdf").
Submit the Google Form at https://forms.gle/F262hswPdmZ6j2st5 by 20 June 2026 (05:00 PM) along with scanned copies of all required documents and fee transaction proof.

After submitting the Google Form, send the duly filled and signed hard copy of the application (Appendix-I) along with self-attested copies of all certificates (age, qualification, experience, caste/EWS/PwBD certificate, NOC, fee payment proof) to: Deputy Director (Administration), Administrative Block, 3rd Floor, AIIMS, Kothipura, Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh – 174037 so as to reach on or before 25 June 2026 (05:00 PM).
Super-scribe the envelope as "Application for the post of ………, Department of ……… for AIIMS, Bilaspur (H.P.)"
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post.

faq.question: Q1. What is the pay scale for Regular Faculty posts at AIIMS Bilaspur?
faq.answer: Professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 14A (Basic Rs. 1,68,900 – 2,20,400) as per 7th CPC. Associate Professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 13A1 (Basic Rs. 1,38,300 – 2,09,200) as per 7th CPC. Assistant Professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 12 (Basic Rs. 1,01,500 – 1,67,400) as per 7th CPC. Plus NPA for candidates with medical qualifications and all usual allowances.

faq.question: Q2. What is the remuneration for Contractual Assistant Professor at AIIMS Bilaspur?
faq.answer: Contractual Assistant Professors will be paid consolidated monthly remuneration as Basic Pay (Rs. 1,01,500) + NPA @ 20% of Basic Pay + Applicable DA. The remuneration remains unchanged for the entire contract period with no annual increment. Retired faculty appointed as consultants will be paid remuneration arrived at by deducting basic pension from pay drawn at retirement.

faq.question: Q3. Is this a rolling advertisement?
faq.answer: Yes. This advertisement is a rolling advertisement and will remain active for one year or till withdrawal to fill unfilled posts, without the need to re-publish. Dates for receipt of applications will be notified on the website www.aiimsbilaspur.edu.in.

faq.question: Q4. Are Professor posts open for Deputation?
faq.answer: Yes, Professor posts are also open for Deputation. The initial period of deputation shall be three years, extendable as per the discretion of the competent authority. Candidates applying for deputation will be considered under Unreserved category.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates apply online for AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is two-step: candidates must first submit the Google Form online at https://forms.gle/F262hswPdmZ6j2st5 by 20 June 2026 (05:00 PM), and also send the hard copy of the application so that it reaches AIIMS Bilaspur by 25 June 2026 (05:00 PM). Failure to submit the offline application form by the due date may lead to cancellation of candidature.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bilaspur Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the Google Form online is 20 June 2026 (05:00 PM) and the last date for the hard copy (offline application) to reach AIIMS Bilaspur is 25 June 2026 (05:00 PM).

Assistant Professor: Entry Level Pay Matrix 12 (Basic Rs. 1,01,500 – 1,67,400) as per 7th CPC. Plus NPA for candidates with medical qualifications and all usual allowances.
